subject: Fwd: Gala partner deck — Cornerstone walkthrough
snippet: Sarah — forwarding the partner deck ahead of the Nov 14 gala...
body:
Sarah,

Forwarding the partner deck from Cornerstone ahead of the Nov 14 gala. They want our social assets two weeks out. Highlights:
- Doors 6:30, program 7:30
- They'll comp the AV if we tag them in the recap reel
- Need final headcount by Oct 31

Can you start roughing out the promo calendar this week?

Denise

subject: Coffee this month?
snippet: Hey you! Last Thursday work for our usual 12:30 virtual coffee?...
body:
Hey you!

Last Thursday of the month — does 12:30 still work for our virtual coffee? I want to hear how the Voices Unheard launch prep is going, and I've got two intro emails I think you'll want.

Send me a calendar invite if so.

Yvonne

subject: Re: Coffee this month?
snippet: Yes please. 12:30 last Thursday is locked...
body:
Yes please. 12:30 last Thursday is locked — invite's on its way.

Launch prep is chaos in the fun way. I'll bring questions about the press list.

Sarah

subject: Voices Unheard — first story batch for review
snippet: Sarah, here's the first batch of community stories for the Oct 2 soft launch...
body:
Sarah,

Here's the first batch of community stories for the Oct 2 soft launch. Three are cleared for quotes, two still need consent forms back. I flagged the ones that would make strong carousel posts.

Want to sync before Wednesday's content review with Denise?

Marcus

subject: Triple your nonprofit's reach in 30 days
snippet: We noticed you run social for a nonprofit...
body:
Hi there,

We noticed you run social for a nonprofit and would love to show you our AI growth toolkit that guarantees 10x engagement overnight...

Best,
The GrowthHack Team

subject: Lease renewal — they sent the form
snippet: Glenwood management emailed the renewal. Can you look before Saturday?...
body:
Glenwood management finally emailed the renewal form. Rent's up $40, ugh. Can you look it over before Saturday so we can sign together?

Also — Portugal fund check-in this weekend? I added $50.

Kait
